title: crotalaria schmitzii
intro: Crotalaria schmitzii, also known as Schmitz's rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a shrub native to Madagascar with medicinal properties, including its leaves and seeds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is reported to have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Crotalaria schmitzii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which have been used to treat fever, cough, and digestive problems.
